domain_stats.item_id_resolution_source: item_dictionary.json name/page_name<->item_id (canonical full item index); previously ge_prices.json (GE/tradeable only)

field_notes.source_item: Symbolic RuneLite gameval ItemID name of the banked input item (from the linked ExperienceItem). source_item_id is the resolved numeric id.
field_notes.skill: Derived from the linked ExperienceItem's Skill (Activity.skill = experienceItem.getSkill()).
field_notes.level_req: Skill level required for the activity.
field_notes.xp_per_action: Base experience granted per action (before any RuneLite plugin modifiers such as outfits/consumption savers). Volatile only across game updates, not prices.
field_notes.rng_activity: True if the plugin flags the activity as RNG-based (e.g. Mastering Mixology); these have null output in source.
field_notes.secondaries: Additional consumed items per action. qty may be fractional (probabilistic averages). qty=null with a 'note' means a custom handler (ByDose/Crushable/Degrime) where exact amount is dose/spell-dependent.
field_notes.output_item: Item produced per action (ItemStack output), null when source produces no tracked item.
field_notes.output_qty: Quantity of output_item per action; may be fractional.
field_notes.account_type: NOT account-sensitive: this dataset is skill-XP-and-materials only, contains no GE/store pricing or gp_hr money methods, so the account-type money gate does not apply. No 'audience'/'pricing_basis' fields are emitted.
field_notes.item_ids: source_item_id / output_item_id / secondaries[].item_id are numeric OSRS item ids resolved by matching the item's symbolic name against ge_prices.json (case-insensitive exact). null = the name did not resolve (see completeness.known_missing).

fix_note: [2026-06-17T18:47:42.134687+00:00] P0: previous numeric item ids were placeholder values in a wrong id range (e.g. BONES=19267; canonical=526).
